goal: Forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay: verify reproducibility, detect leakage, confirm same-window improvement, and deliver a final CONFIRMED / DOWNGRADED / REJECTED verdict.
global_constraints: Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify or re-tune the base.
No new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes allowed.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate independent runs — never aggregated.
Rule-based (threshold / bucket) overlay must be validated before any model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE verdict only after every forensic block passes; any confirmed leakage triggers REJECTED.
No mixing of reproduction checks, leakage checks, and new ideas in the same run.

slices.title: Window integrity audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that all v10 runs used identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows with no look-ahead.
slices.objective: Verify that all v10 runs used identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows with no look-ahead.
success_criteria: Verdict recorded: window discipline valid or invalid with specific violations.
evidence_requirements: Verdict recorded: window discipline valid or invalid with specific violations.

slices.title: Feature leakage audit
slices.hypothesis: Confirm every micro-feature is causally clean — no future information leaks into decision time.
slices.objective: Confirm every micro-feature is causally clean — no future information leaks into decision time.
success_criteria: Per-feature verdict: leakage absent, suspicious, or confirmed leakage.
evidence_requirements: Per-feature verdict: leakage absent, suspicious, or confirmed leakage.

slices.title: Label leakage and shortcut audit
slices.hypothesis: Determine whether veto labels are near-identical to features, making model success tautological.
slices.objective: Determine whether veto labels are near-identical to features, making model success tautological.
success_criteria: Verdict recorded: labels valid, labels too shortcut-prone, or labels invalid.
evidence_requirements: Verdict recorded: labels valid, labels too shortcut-prone, or labels invalid.
